title: Security: HeapOverflow in CertificatesHandler
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
When doing operation [] for |selected_cert_list_|[1], there is no check whether the size is equal to 1. The out of bounds will occur when using |selected_cert_list_[0]|.  
  
[1]. https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:chrome/browser/ui/webui/certifi
